programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 2
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 3
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 4
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 5
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 6
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oak House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to Oak House, said to be one of the most haunted places in West Bromwich. Fear and fright take hold when something seems to follow them and one experience changes the belief of both Glen and Karl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Middleton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette and her team are called to a grade II listed building that spans over 900 years in an attempt to uncover the mysterious paranormal activity that is said to occur there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team take on their biggest challenge yet in a prison where many have lost their lives and some seem to have remained.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation takes the team to the condemned cell and execution room. Is it a hangman or one of the executed souls that makes itself present and causes the team to re-evaluate what they are doing.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Devil's Tattoo, Static Man, The Bloody Hand, Where Have All the Heroes Gone, War Surplus.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Writer's Agent, Crypt Ghost, The Doll, Hubert's Curse, Shared Vision.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3

programme.title: Robocar Poli
programme.desc: On the day with a lot of lightning, one of the wheels in the Mr Wheeler's store is stolen. The question is whether there is a thief in the city or the mystery has another solution.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: It's very hot outside, so Ollie draws a fan. It blows away Pamela and Raoul's hat, hanging on their beach umbrella.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Pétole is furious when her parents refuse her from having a pet. Pamela draws her a dog, but she is not very good at it. They attempt to get rid of the unwanted sketch, but guilt leads them to an unexpected solution.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Raoul gets very disappointed when he writes such a lengthy Christmas list that there could be no way for him to get everything he asked for.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Raoul is too fearful to ride the ghost train, so Ollie decides to draw a brave version of Raoul to try and help set an example so he does not feel so afraid anymore.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Finding himself on a dangerous adventure, Olive gets swept away by a small grey cloud and leaves his magic pencil behind that Mustard tries to then use to find him.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The MiniWhats are bored because they're not allowed to spend as much time on their tablets as they would like.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Mustard is annoyed because he has to take care of his little brother, Braylon, who drives everyone mad. Braylon wants to play pirates, so Ollie draws him a boat, which disappears with Braylon on board.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Pamela lost a tooth, but the Tooth Fairy didn't visit her. The MiniWhats are outraged, so they set off in pursuit of the evil Tooth Fairy and end up in Tooth Fairy Land, where they have to face the horrendous Cavities.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Mustard's skateboard was confiscated after he crossed the street without looking. Cars are so lame, if only one could fly over them. Ollie draws a magic lamp from which a very generous Genie emerges.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Petula and Pamela set off on a pony in search of the treasure buried at the foot of the rainbow. The MiniWhats try to track them down with help from a knight with a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: It's winter, but there's still no snow. Ollie paints the sky grey, and suddenly, there's a snowstorm, so the gang make a snowman called Bernulf.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Mixo has decided to learn hieroglyphics, but if he really wants to do that, he needs to see the real thing, in Egypt. Ollie draws a camel, and off they go.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Today is Mustard's birthday, and the MiniWhats are trying to figure out what to get him.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Raoul is worried about his parents' plans to move. Ollie draws a very strange house. It looks tiny from the outside, but once they get inside, it's much bigger.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Raoul wakes up from a nightmare, and Ollie is drawing a forest. Suddenly, a little girl seems to fall from the sky. It's Claraputter the witch, an apprentice witch who isn't very good with spells and has just had an accident with her broom.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Petula wishes she were rich so she could travel to faraway places, so Ollie draws her a treasure island. Raoul falls overboard, and the MiniWhats end up in the belly of a whale. They meet a strange pirate who helps them get back to dry land.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The MiniWhats have presentations to prepare for school. Ollie draws a car and they set off on a safari to prehistoric times. They see a dachshund that goes on forever, volcanoes, and a huge mammoth.

programme.title: The MiniWhats

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Except for Mixo, the MiniWhats don't like eating their vegetables. Ollie draws a table, and they find themselves at Giacommo's, a restaurant that specialises in strange vegetables.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: When Petula shows up, she is hiding her cheek as she has a big, ugly spot on her face. Mustard looks at it and thinks it needs to be treated.

programme.title: The MiniWhats

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come

programme.title: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Gleaming The Cube
programme.desc: A young avid skateboarder uncovers a conspiracy while investigating his adoptive brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Lost Treasure of Ugarit
programme.desc: Young archaeologist Jack Hunter refuses to join his mentor, Professor Shaffer, who believes a poem is a coded treasure map, on a relic hunt, until his friend is murdered to steal it. The suspect is a Syrian artifact trader so he flies to Damascas.

programme.title: Killer Infatuation
programme.desc: Mackenzie runs a killer-dedicated podcast with a large fan base. However, she begins living her own murder mystery, as she develops an infatuation with her impossibly attractive new neighbor, who was the prime suspect in a murder years ago.

programme.title: Twin Betrayal
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: Hacker
programme.desc: As a teenage girl, Laura witnessed the arrest of her father, a brilliant hacker. As an adult, Laura has become a hacker to assist in national security.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac continues the investigation into the murder of Chief Carver's sister.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A department store manager is found dead inside his store's holiday window display,

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate when a bakery owner is gunned down on his own premises.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality TV star dies at a premiere, each of her co-stars becomes a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team recreate a crime scene that has been washed away.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A roller derby arena provides the backdrop for a grisly crime.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine's testimony in court is not enough to convict a killer suspected of murdering his own mother. Adam Novak, with whom Catherine had a brief romantic encounter, is the lawyer who represents the killer and secures his freedom.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: As Catherine and Keppler begin to investigate the murder of a teen-aged Jane Doe, both agree that the killer, who was meticulous in removing evidence from the body and its surrounding area, is likely a repeat offender.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A case involving a man's torched corpse whose bones and tissues had been harvested leads Nick and Keppler into the disturbing world of illegally sold human body parts.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom returns from his teaching sabbatical as new member of the team, Michael Keppler desperately tries to keep his dark past hidden from his colleagues.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: With potentially less than a day to attempt to prevent the next murders, the CSI team must quickly shake off their shock that the true miniature killer is not the late Ernie Edward Dell, who committed suicide after confessing to the slayings.

programme.title: Scorpion: Once Bitten, Twice Die
programme.desc: When a conflict in Eastern Europe threatens to escalate, Team Scorpion is called on to help facilitate secret peace talks to prevent World War III.

programme.title: Scorpion: Young Hearts Spark Fire
programme.desc: While on a mission to save lost hikers, Team Scorpion's helicopter crashes, igniting a massive wildfire that quickly closes in on them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crossroads
programme.desc: To protect a key witness who is en route to testifying against a deadly drug cartel, Team Scorpion takes her on the run, with the cartel hot on their heels.

programme.desc: Walter finally learns Cabe's long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite Of Love

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: A beautiful woman (Marie Avgeropoulos) helps a New York bicycle messenger (Taylor Lautner) who's in hot water with a group of gangsters.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: A doctor returns to his wife in London with a mermaid disguised as his patient.

programme.title: Medium: Girls Ain't Nothing But Trouble
programme.desc: Larry Watt, a defense attorney who has caused trouble in Allison's past, asks Allison to be a consultant for him. Low on money, Allison accepts his offer.

programme.title: Medium: Aftertaste
programme.desc: Devalos tries to reclaim the D.A.'s office. Allison's support of Devalos is tested when she has visions of Devalos' strongest political supporter involved in a horrible conspiracy.

programme.title: Medium: Burn, Baby Burn - Part 1
programme.desc: Joe's mother pays a surprise visit, which worries Allison because she hasn't seen her since her psychic abilities became public knowledge.

programme.title: Medium: Burn, Baby Burn - Part 2

programme.title: Medium: Wicked Game - Part 1
programme.desc: While working to locate a missing local girl, Allison learns about secrets from Cynthia Keener's past.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: What starts out as a routine security watch for the SRU turns into a critical situation when the wife of the man they were hired to protect is kidnapped from underneath their noses.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a woman kidnaps another woman whom she suspects of having an affair with her husband, the SRU is called to the scene.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a former SRU veteran shows up at headquarters and locks himself in a safe room with the intent to commit suicide, Ed is called to the scene and attempts to talk his former teacher out of ending his life.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A past mission comes back to haunt Ed when he discovers that a sniper who has taken over City Hall is the son of a man that he killed on a previous mission

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When three men take the CEO of a mortgage company hostage, the SRU team is called to the scene to diffuse the situation.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When the SRU is called to the scene of an upper class household where four hostages are being held, they discover that the hostage taker is actually the boyfriend of the family's nanny.

programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: The life of celebrated but reclusive author, J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel, "The Catcher in the Rye".

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First Breath

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sins of the Father

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Limbo
programme.desc: The Taelons lend some of their dwindling core energy to Joshua Doors for a pilot cold fusion project, but the energy is stolen, leaving the Taelons vulnerable. Jonathan Doors lives on as an AI in cyberspace.

programme.title: The Lost World: Brothers in Arms

programme.title: The Lost World: Ice Age

programme.title: The Lost World: The End Game

programme.title: The Lost World: Phantoms

programme.title: The Lost World: The Secret

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E3 - What Was Lost, Part 2: Resurrection

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E5 - Promises

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E6 - Natural Election

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E7 - John Quixote
programme.desc: Crichton and Chiana get stuck in a video game where they encounter strange/twisted versions of their friends.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 139
programme.desc: Does a car explode when driven off a cliff? Can a huge rocket launch a cage holding a human, and would the person survive?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 161
programme.desc: Can a motorcycle pull a tablecloth out from under a setting for a banquet? Do humans really use only 10% of their brain?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 99
programme.desc: Myths tested: Will a flaming trail of gasoline from a moving vehicle catch up to its tank and cause it to explode? Can a person be burned by a defibrillator if they are wearing a nipple ring?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 201
programme.desc: Could Jack have survived with Rose in the ending of "Titanic"? Is it possible to build a rocket-powered surfboard?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 204
programme.desc: Are people actually well-acquainted with the backs of their own hands? Can a needle be thrown through a glass pane without shattering it? Is it really impossible to ride a bicycle underwater?

programme.title: Mythbusters Revealed Special
programme.desc: The fans are in for a treat with this special episode which opens the archives to the best of the show’s bad takes, flubs and flops, many of which have never been screened before.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four year old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death
programme.desc: During WWII, several murders occur at a convalescent home where Dr. Watson has volunteered his services. Holmes is summoned to solve the crime from a long list of suspects including the owners, staff, and the patients.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Visiting a home of high nobility, a businessman is murdered.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client
programme.desc: Sir Charles Farnsworth is found dead in his mysterious Farnsworth Castle. It turns out that Farnsworth had a clause inserted in this will that his death, no matter what the apparent cause, would be investigated by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Spider Woman
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes investigates a series of so-called \\"pajama suicides\\". He knows the female villain behind them is as cunning as Moriarty and as venomous as a spider.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a missing boy that vanishes on a train after he and his father have a fight.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Tyrant's Daughter
programme.desc: A chemist is accused of the murder of his fiancé's stepfather, who was determined to keep the two apart.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson investigate the legend of a supernatural hound, a beast that may be stalking a young heir on the fog-shrouded moorland that makes up his estate.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's gruelling challenge nears its climax. The chefs take turns leading the kitchen for dinner service. Find out who will make the final and who will fall at the final hurdle.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's extreme cookery challenge reaches its climax as the final two hopefuls battle it out for a coveted head chef's job. Who will Gordon choose as this year's winner?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay is bringing back former black jacket chefs to compete in an all-star season for the biggest prize in Hell's Kitchen history.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: 16 all-star chefs compete against each other in a bar menu challenge and Chef Ramsay surprises everyone with a shocking elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With 15 chefs remaining, the Red and Blue teams must race against each other to build a gourmet seafood tower and later go head to head in a heated dinner service with table side appetisers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After Ashley goes home, the chefs compete in a Letter Lottery challenge. The women enjoy a beautiful day in Santa Barbara. At dinner service, Josh has a portion control problem, Giovanni sends up raw pork, and Benjamin serves a raw Wellington.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Girls Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Sallie-Anne Huckstepp and Juanita Nielsen were iconic figures in the shadowy King’s Cross scene of the 1970s and 1980s. They lived dangerous lives – challenging the status quo of the period and met with mysterious and violent deaths.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No More Grannies / The Granny Killer
programme.desc: We delve into the twisted mind of one of Australia's most prolific serial murderers. John Wayne Glover - The Granny Killer, was truly an evil man.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders
programme.desc: In the late 1980s and early 1990s a series of violent murders took place near Sydney’s famous Bondi Beach.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag
programme.desc: CI examines the Dr. Victor Chang extortion murder as well as the horrific Jane Doe Case where a girl is found lying on the side of the road of an inner Sydney suburb wrapped in two plastic garbage bags.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today, Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Business
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. As Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Felons Interrupted
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Run's House: Bonless Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: The episode begins with Rev Run on stage in what is his final performance of his tour with Kid Rock. Rev returns home and his hopes of getting his diet back on track are thwarted by Russy's new cooking hobby.

programme.title: Run's House: Pass The Frame

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Gen-Why Me Episode

programme.desc: An aggressive one-eyed Australian shepherd needs special treatment. A traumatized black and tan coonhound is terrified of people, a Maltese gets a little too excited when guests drop by.

programme.desc: Meet a feral dog who likes to guard pregnant horses on a ranch. English bulldog Rocco joins an existing pack and targets one of his brothers. A rescued pit bull terrier is a couch potato.

programme.desc: A woman and her teen daughter accuse an estranged relative of assaulting them at a family party/A woman is suing her former friend for repossessing her truck; her friend argues that the vehicle was never insured.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.181

programme.desc: Lee Meriwether and Malachi Throne are guest stars in an IMF plot involving doubles and double-dealing, with Paris playing five different roles and Jim Phelps turning magician on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Containing one third of the world's trees, the frozen forests of the Taiga are the lungs of the planet. This great forest spans across shores of the Pacific, sheltering some of the Earth's most majestic animals, and some of its most secretive.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Hunters of Noah's Ark

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fin Del Mundo
programme.desc: Although he admits to not being much of a sailor, George climbs aboard a sailing vessel to explore the extreme southern tip of South America (Fin Del Mundo aka the "End of the World").

programme.title: Angry Planet: African Hellhole
programme.desc: George explores the deadly Nyiragongo volcano in the Congo jungle but the lava lake dwelling inside it's crater may be the least of his worries as he has to negotiate through armed conflict, a family of gorillas, and severe weather.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Dark Side

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living In Space

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT
programme.desc: The ISS is the workhorse of the international spacefaring community, but its days are numbered. R

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS

programme.title: MOON SHINE

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers

programme.title: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's assignment at Christmastime is to show a disillusioned columnist that there's still some good out there.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to re-open an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Secret
programme.desc: Amanda insists Alexis acknowledge their relationship and begs her to reveal her father's identity. Alexis tells her it was simply an anonymous ski instructor in Gstaad. Steven and Alexis reconcile.

programme.title: Dynasty: Domestic Intrigue
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean on a dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kristina
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty: Swept Away

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: El Alamein
programme.desc: Erwin Rommel battles Allied forces in North Africa in 1942.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: North Africa (November 1942)

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Burma: The Forgotten Front (Spring 1943)
programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Sicily
programme.desc: Fresh from victory in North Africa, the Allies successfully invade the island of Sicily, staging an eventual Italian withdrawal from the war.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Ploesti
programme.desc: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a daring 1943 mission.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Monte Cassino (September 3, 1943)
programme.desc: As the allies make their way into Italy, they encounter tremendous resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line. One of these locations is an ancient monastery called Monte Cassino.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Gilbert Islands (November 1943)
programme.desc: Bloody fighting erupts on a group of tiny Pacific islands in November 1943.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Anzio
programme.desc: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Kwajalein
programme.desc: Examining the battle at the Kwajelein Atoll in the South Pacific during 1944. Included: operations by the Seabees.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jen & Skylar
programme.desc: After being bullied in her past, Jen relies on online communities to establish relationships. After meeting Skylar online, they immediately hit it off. But they've never met in person!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 206

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 112

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 103

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 104

programme.title: The Hills: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer / Don't Cry On Your Birthday

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Love comes and goes

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: As her final step in getting her life together, Chelsea finds a GED class at a local college and takes her first practice test. Jenelle decides that rehab is the only way she'll stay clean.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Rise of The Bomber

programme.desc: War Without Boundaries: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Lost Continent (Atlantis)

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sweet Smell of Revenge

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Paddlefish

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Interstate Game Check
programme.desc: This week the Wardens set up a game checkpoint to make sure everyone is following the rules.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Chuck Coal

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Warden
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Arthur: Fernkenstein's Monster/D.W., Dancing Queen
programme.desc: Inspired by Mary Shelley's "Frankenstein," Fern tells a tale so scary that Arthur and the gang become afraid of her! Then, Binky decides to teach D.W. to dance, but she just doesn't seem to get the moves. Is D.W. a no-talent klutz?

programme.title: Arthur: Rhyme For Your Life/For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: While struggling to write a poem for his mom, Binky falls asleep and gets trapped in Verseberg--where it's a crime not to rhyme! And D.W. has lost her voice! For Arthur it's a dream come true--until Mom asks Arthur to take care of D.W.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur: Summer Stories
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Baby Brother
programme.desc: Barney reminds Baby Bop and BJ that although babies start out little, they grow fast. Through pretend play, favorite songs and fun games, they learn about the many ways we grow every day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop isn’t satisfied with the things she can do. When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the Park Kids to play with her instead of working in a garden. RIFF plays detective to track down the source of a mysterious sound in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: That Makes Me Mad!
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Swoop
programme.desc: he Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base, and attempt to take the other two minicons that, with the one Megatron captured on the island, combine to make the supremely powerful Star Sabre. Can Hot Shot save the day?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Overmatch
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre, but the arrival of a new Decepticon proves him overconfident. The Decepticons acquire the first of another three combining minicons which transform into the ultimate form of defence.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Gale
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Credulous
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With the loss of the Star Sabre, the Autobots keep losing battles. In a fog-bound valley, Megatron plots to get the Sabre from Starscream, at the same time boosting his crew's confidence in himself. Scavenger's secret is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Trust
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon. Despite using the Star Sabre, this time Megatron loses - and Scavenger finally gains the Autobots' trust.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vacation
programme.desc: A weekend's camping trip to the valley below the dam goes wrong when a violent storm moves in. With Red Alert trapped in a mudslide, the sluice gates about to open, and local reporter Kelly filming, how will the Autobots escape detection?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Reinforcement
programme.desc: Autobot Blurr joins the team, but proves himself not much of a team player. The Decepticons acquire the final minicon to create the Skyboom Shield, the most powerful defensive weapon in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Decisive Battle
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle. However, when all seems lost Optimus' minicon summons the Skyboom Shield to protect his master.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtle Terminator

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high tech objects. This is a case of absolute urgency. Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered a truly wild new game, an augmented reality programme on the ranger's digital tablet. Grizzy confiscates this toy and becomes a fan of the salmon fishing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The only edible food item left in the ranger's cabin is a salmon stuck inside a block of ice. Starving, Grizzy decides to melt the ice with the blow dryer. Only the Lemmings are already using it for their latest rocket game in the piping system.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have unearthed a box filled with birthday fountains of light that spit forth giant bursts of sparks. They have a blast, but their new game is not really compatible with a bear's nap.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's last jar of chocolate spread has been pinched by the Lemmings, who are savouring it in secret.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Wedged in his sofa to relieve his aching back, Grizzy baulks at getting up. He designs clever strategies to do everything from a distance, including confiscating the Lemming's radio-controlled toy robot transformer, which he will use as a butler.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The vibrations created by Grizzy's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzy changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a birthday piñata in the ranger's living room. The idea of bursting open a papier-mache statue with a bat as it says in the instructions pleases him.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Inside a mysterious cave, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a magical Game of the Goose. The events displayed in the squares that the players land on come true in real life.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is bothered by an object stuck in between the sofa cushions. It's a big fur lemming puppet glove and the Lemmings believe that the puppet is a Super Lemming who's stronger than Grizzy and start to obey it.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the ranger's cabin, which was entirely redecorated for the occasion.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When the last jar of chocolate spread they were fighting over sinks to the bottom of the river, Grizzy and the Lemmings have no choice but to dive in to recover it. But to their great surprise, they discover you can't breathe in water.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a strange figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: While salmon fishing on the riverbank, Grizzy hauls in an unusual catch: an old hand mirror straight out of a fairytale; instead of showing the reflection of the person who holds it, the mirror shows an idealized vision of his surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: In a casing that fell from a circus caravan, the Lemmings find a magic stick that can enchant objects and make them come alive.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy calls upon his fishing instincts to seduce the she-bear, but only succeeds in making a fool of himself. When he sees the Lemmings riding a magnificent wild salmon like rodeo cowboys, he tries to steal theirs.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: A big secret's out, and Wolf can't deal. Kipo must resist the urge to pet Mega Bunny babies before escaping from sticky Mod Frog Jamack.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: It's a high-jumping, thirsty Mega Flea vs. the Mega Dogs as Kipo closes in on the burrow, but disaster may have followed her home.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo has to go through an old friend before flying off to find Scarlemagne and save her father; it is time learn Timbercat survival skills.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo hitches a ride in search of the Chevre Sisters, hoping to tap her inner strength. Scarlemagne turns to Lio for help; the cheese sees all.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy is out for a walk in his hat. He joins the other Tubbies to watch two girls have their hands painted by their auntie. Po puts her hand in her Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky fetches the others to watch two little boys making bread. They kneed the dough and once it is baked they eat the bread with jam.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children playing with torches. In Teletubbyland, Po chases Tinky Winky, and Po catches him.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, it's time for Tubby Toast, but there's no Tubby Toast for Laa‑Laa. She is very sad, so the other Tubbies share their extra toast with Laa-Laa. Some children learn about the number six.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po invites Tinky Winky to dance, and they dance all around Home Hill. Tamzin Griffin pretends to be Funny Lady and tells the story of the very proud crown.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance through Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number five.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say "Eh-oh", and then run off to watch two children go for a ride in a hovercraft. The Teletubbies are very careful not to drop their Tubby blankets on the floor, but if they do, the Noo Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little girl make some Bagels with her uncle. It’s time for Tubby Custard. Laa-Laa sits down to eat her Tubby Custard, but she waits for Po.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a Seaweed Farm for Annie Pickles – Farmer Pickles cousin. Scrambler volunteers to help Annie collect seaweed seedling on the beach.

programme.title: Bob's Big Plan
programme.desc: When Bob and the team are building an extension to the offices of Mr Adams the local architect, Bob hears of a competition to build a brand new town in nearby Sunflower Valley, a place Bob knows very well from his childhood. Mr Adams shows Bob his idea.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is playing with the Sunflower Valley children; Sunny, Saffron, Carlo and Cassia in the playground. It’s the last day before they have to go back to school in Bobsville and they are all sad to be leaving.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang leave to convert a house into two separate flats. Mr Bentley, meanwhile, has been left in charge of The Mayor’s dog.

programme.title: The Legend of the Golden Hammer
programme.desc: Our first sight of Fixham is in the episodic special The Legend Of The Golden Hammer. The Legend of the Golden Hammer consists of six stories in which Bob and his team tackle building jobs at six of Fixham’s key locations.

programme.title: Race to the Finish
programme.desc: Mayor Bentley announces that Sunflower Valley is to stage its very first athletics tournament. A team from Sunflower Valley is to compete against a team of visiting athletes. Plus there is to be a special machine event!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert and Dot, Bob’s Mum and Dad are visiting the Valley. Bob shows them around, pointing out their recycling storeroom. Robert notices Bob’s old rubble chute. Bob explains that he hasn’t had much use for it out in the valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is erecting a tent to accommodate some newcomers to the valley. Mr Bentley is organising everything, but unfortunately leaves his phone with Spud who promptly declares himself ‘Mr Bentley’s Assistant’.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been asked to install a new air conditioning unit at Mr Sabatini’s restaurant. Wendy and Molly meanwhile have been asked to redecorate the library at the school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles wants a fence built around his compost heap, as Scruffty keeps getting into it. Muck is excited at the prospect of such a mucky job. JJ sends Trix up to the farm with the materials.

programme.title: 2023 TOUR Championship - Final Round
programme.desc: Watch the final round of the 2023 TOUR Championship, where Viktor Hovland shot a 7-under par 63 to claim his sixth PGA TOUR victory and first FedExCup at East Lake Golf Club in Atlanta, Georgia.

programme.title: The Starter
programme.desc: Catch up on all the latest happenings on the PGA TOUR with feature content on the best players in the world.

programme.title: Austin Eckroat Wins the World Wide Technology Championship
programme.desc: Austin Eckroat cards 11 birdies in the Final Round to capture the 2024 World Wide Technology Championship by a single stroke for his second PGA TOUR title of the 2024 season.

programme.title: Russell Henley Wins Arnold Palmer Invitational
programme.desc: Russell Henley captures his fifth PGA TOUR victory after winning the 2025 Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard. Henley shot rounds of 72-68-67-70 to finish 11-under par.

programme.title: Brice Garnett Wins 2024 Puerto Rico Open
programme.desc: Brice Garnett outlasts Erik Barnes in a four-hole playoff to win the 2024 Puerto Rico Open. Garnett's triumph at Grand Reserve Golf Club is his second win on the PGA TOUR.

programme.title: Golf Digest
programme.desc: Join Tiger Woods for an in-depth look at how he plays the game.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The sixth Doctor Who, Colin Baker, joins the first Doctor's assistant, Peter Purves, exploring Herefordshire and Worcestershire in a TARDIS disguised as a 1970 Morris Minor. Experts Will Axon and James Braxton help them navigate.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Brooke-Taylor and Graeme Garden get back into character as they join Will Axon and Philip Serrell and take to the road in Devon. Along the way, these off-the-wall comedians enter the equally surreal world of two eccentric inventors.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Hermione Norris and John Thomson join up with Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon on a classic car trip through Cornwall, aiming to buy antiques for auction in London. On the way, John learns nautical history and Hermione takes off.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts trade homes for antiques! Paired up with experts James Braxton and James Lewis, they scour Hampshire in search of bargains to sell at auction for profit--to benefit Children in Need.

programme.title: Ranking Darts Players
programme.desc: Watch Paul Nicholson rank the top darts players, sharing his expert opinion and analysis.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Kevin Painter reflects on his top career moments and opens up about his recent struggles with dartitis.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Group A Day One, International Pairs 2.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Socorro Close Encounter, Update: Car Crash Thank You, Kentucky Visions, Foster Twins & Update and Elevator Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who Plugged Bugsy?, Colorado Cop Killer & UD, Suddenly Psychic, The Wrong Grave and Wiseguy Wannabe & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Doggie Bowser MD, UD: College Student Murders, Furniture Store Shoot Out, Pts. 1 & 2 and Kurt Cobain.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Pizza Man & UD, The Dale & UD, Update: Mrs. Millionaire and Teri's Killer.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: I'm so scared
programme.desc: A large haunted and abandoned hotel without electricity in Wales is the venue in this episode, where phantom figures, unexplained voices, and footsteps have been experienced. Investigator Mark Nicholas joins the team. But who will take charge tonight?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Are you kidding me!?
programme.desc: A ghostly white lady, phantom footsteps, and more have been reported at this quirky haunted guest house. Fellow investigator Adam Morgan joins the team as they witness for themselves some of the reported phenomenon. Who will Sara put in charge tonight?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: That was so weird!
programme.desc: A beautiful old-but-haunted town hall, under the shadow of Pendle Hill, is investigated as the team visit Lancashire. Phil witnesses an unexplained figure, Dale gets an unwelcome surprise, and Sara does a vigil with a royal ‘guest’.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: There's knocking upstairs!
programme.desc: A ghostly lady, a spectral young boy, and other paranormal incidents are investigated by the Are You Haunted team at a former textile mill in West Yorkshire. Investigator Miki York once again joins the team for a night full of unexplained occurrences.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who whistled then?
programme.desc: A haunted market venue with a dark past is investigated by the team. A distressed Dale has to leave a vigil, two team members see a dark shape, and there’s a phantom whistler. But who is put in charge of this investigation?

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 6
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 7
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation takes the team to the condemned cell and execution room. Is it a hangman or one of the executed souls that makes itself present and causes the team to re-evaluate what they are doing.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 3
programme.desc: The concluding part of the teams biggest investigation sees Yvette get the biggest shock of.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Abbey House Museum
programme.desc: Yvette introduces a brand new Most Haunted team member, Watson, a bulldog. This location starts to give up its mysteries as soon as the team arrive and they have go film differently to accommodate a particularly aggressive poltergeist.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse stable
programme.desc: The first team ever to be allowed into the very haunted Wentworth Woodhouse Stable Block and the team film the best evidence ever, has a ghost been caught on camera? Watson sees something and team see someone who couldn’t possibly have been there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Slaughter House
programme.desc: The Slaughterhouse is Liverpool’s oldest pub and gives the team more than they bargained for as object are moved from underneath the team’s noses.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Find, The Golden Cue, The FBI Story, The Gravedigger's Nemesis, Last Rites.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of the Dead
programme.desc: Unseen intruders attack 10-year-old Billy Bean. He struggles to learn the secrets of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes from the Grave
programme.desc: Ron and Nancy learn their house is a way station between life and death.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hell House
